prompt: A minimalist food photograph featuring a single apple on a clean matte white surface, caught mid-transformation into a 3D pixel art style. The left half is perfectly photorealistic while the right half dissolves into large floating geometric cubes, each cube exposing the food's vibrant colors, textures, and inner details. Soft studio lighting, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, hyperrealistic meets geometric abstraction, subtle motion blur on the cubes. High resolution cinematic close-up composition.
